message:
test(connectors): add comprehensive test suites for 8 connectors

Add schema completeness, introspection metadata, capability mapping,
safety tier, risk level, idempotency, required field, and error taxonomy
tests across google-calendar, notion, openai, slack, twilio, twitter,
and gmail connectors. Fix gmail tests to use proper Ed25519-signed
capability tokens. Total ~5000 lines of new test coverage.

- Google Calendar: 20+ connector tests, 15+ error tests
- Notion: error taxonomy tests
- OpenAI: connector, error, and type serialization tests (~2500 lines)
- Slack: connector and error tests (~950 lines)
- Twilio: connector and error tests (~600 lines)
- Twitter: connector, error, lib unit, and stream tests (~1240 lines)
- Gmail: fix 3 tests to use Ed25519-signed tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
